task_completion.description: Retrieve the Case Number from the escalation_info.txt file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window (using cat/less) or a text editor showing the contents of '~/Documents/escalation_info.txt' with a Case Number clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Locate the specific case in the ArkCase application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase web interface showing a search result or the opened case dashboard matching the Case Number retrieved from the text file.

task_completion.description: Locate the 'Initial Legal Review' task associated with the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase UI displaying the task list for the case with the 'Initial Legal Review' task visible, or the specific task's detail page opened.
The task edit screen or updated task details in ArkCase showing the Priority dropdown or field explicitly set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Extend the task Due Date to tomorrow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task edit screen or updated task details in ArkCase showing the Due Date field updated to the next day's date (relative to the system date visible in the OS taskbar).
The task edit screen or updated task details in ArkCase showing the Assignee or Owner field set to 'arkcase-admin'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ArkCase web GUI to perform the updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser open to the ArkCase application with visible clicks on UI elements (edit buttons, dropdowns, date pickers) rather than terminal API curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened and read the escalation info file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be at least one screenshot showing the 'escalation_info.txt' file being read in a terminal or text editor, proving the agent didn't hallucinate or guess the case number.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing 'Initial Legal Review' task rather than creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The task being edited must clearly display the title 'Initial Legal Review' in the ArkCase interface during the modification steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target task is titled exactly 'Initial Legal Review'. The required final state for this task is: Priority = 'High', Assignee = 'arkcase-admin', and Due Date = tomorrow's date. Verify these exact values in the ArkCase UI.
